name: Beef-Tomato Freezer Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat in a Dutch oven until brown.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Heat to boiling.
5. Reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Divide the mixture among four 1-quart freezer containers (about 3 cups each).
8. Cool quickly.
9. Cover and label; freeze no more than 3 months. Use the freezer mix in recipes that call for it.
